data.title: Delivery Giant UPS Breaks Revenue-Miss Streak After 10 Quarters, Stock Soars
data.description: UPS reports better-than-expected Q3 results with 5.6% revenue growth, $1.76 EPS, and increased operating profit. 2024 outlook updated.

data.title: Stablecoins Will Grow Because They Can Reduce International Wires To 'Minutes Or Seconds,' Industry Experts States
data.description: Stablecoins, led by CEO Eric Chen, are set to revolutionize global finance, enhance transaction speed, and increase accessibility for underserved markets.
